import React,{useState,useEffect,useRef}from'react';import CandlestickChart from'../components/CandlestickChart';import TradingControls from'../components/TradingControls';import RecentTrades from'../components/RecentTrades';import StrategySelector from'../components/StrategySelector';import AccountInfo from'../components/AccountInfo';import DerivService from'../services/DerivService';import'./Dashboard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Dashboard=_ref=>{let{apiToken,accountType,platform}=_ref;const[currentPrice,setCurrentPrice]=useState(1234.56);const[lastDigit,setLastDigit]=useState(4);const[chartData,setChartData]=useState([]);const[trades,setTrades]=useState([]);const[balance,setBalance]=useState(accountType==='demo'?10000:0);const[connected,setConnected]=useState(false);const[selectedStrategy,setSelectedStrategy]=useState(null);const[isTrading,setIsTrading]=useState(false);const[connectionError,setConnectionError]=useState(null);const derivService=useRef(null);// Reset stats function
const resetStats=()=>{setTrades([]);if(derivService.current){derivService.current.resetStats();}console.log('Stats reset');};// Generate initial chart data
useEffect(()=>{const initialData=[];let price=1234.56;for(let i=0;i<50;i++){price+=(Math.random()-0.5)*2;initialData.push({time:Date.now()-(50-i)*60000,open:price-Math.random(),high:price+Math.random(),low:price-Math.random(),close:price,volume:Math.floor(Math.random()*1000)});}setChartData(initialData);},[]);// Initialize Deriv service and connect
useEffect(()=>{console.log('Initializing Deriv service...');console.log('Account Type:',accountType);console.log('API Token:',apiToken?`${apiToken.substring(0,8)}...`:'No token');// Create new Deriv service instance
derivService.current=new DerivService();// Connect to Deriv
const connectToDeriv=async()=>{try{setConnectionError(null);if(accountType==='demo'&&!apiToken){var _derivService$current;// Demo account without token - create new demo account
console.log('Creating new Deriv demo account...');await((_derivService$current=derivService.current)===null||_derivService$current===void 0?void 0:_derivService$current.createDemoAccount());setConnected(true);setBalance(10000);console.log('Demo account created successfully');}else{var _derivService$current2;// Connect with token
console.log('Connecting with token...');await((_derivService$current2=derivService.current)===null||_derivService$current2===void 0?void 0:_derivService$current2.connect(apiToken,accountType==='demo'));setConnected(true);}}catch(err){console.error('Connection error:',err);setConnectionError(err.message||'Failed to connect to Deriv');setConnected(false);}};connectToDeriv();// Set up event listeners
if(derivService.current){// Balance updates
derivService.current.on('connected',data=>{console.log('Connected event received:',data);setConnected(true);if(data.balance){setBalance(data.balance);}setConnectionError(null);});// Tick updates
derivService.current.on('tick',data=>{if(data&&data.price){setCurrentPrice(data.price);setLastDigit(Math.floor(data.price)%10);// Update chart data
setChartData(prev=>{const newData=[...prev];const lastCandle=newData[newData.length-1];const now=Date.now();const minuteTime=Math.floor(now/60000)*60000;if(!lastCandle||lastCandle.time!==minuteTime){newData.push({time:minuteTime,open:data.price,high:data.price,low:data.price,close:data.price,volume:1});}else{lastCandle.high=Math.max(lastCandle.high,data.price);lastCandle.low=Math.min(lastCandle.low,data.price);lastCandle.close=data.price;lastCandle.volume+=1;}return newData.slice(-100);});}});// Candle updates
derivService.current.on('candle',data=>{if(data&&data.candle){setChartData(prev=>[...prev.slice(-100),data.candle]);}});// Trade updates
derivService.current.on('trade',trade=>{console.log('Trade completed:',trade);setTrades(prev=>[trade,...prev.slice(0,49)]);if(trade.profit){setBalance(prev=>prev+trade.profit);}});// Balance updates
derivService.current.on('balance',data=>{if(data&&data.balance){setBalance(data.balance);}});// Error updates
derivService.current.on('error',error=>{console.error('Deriv error:',error);setConnectionError(error.message||'Trading error occurred');});}// Cleanup on unmount
return()=>{if(derivService.current){derivService.current.disconnect();}};},[apiToken,accountType]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{children:["KXNG",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"TRADER"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"subtitle",children:"Elite Trading Dashboard"}),connectionError&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{marginTop:'8px',padding:'6px 12px',background:'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)',border:'1px solid #ef4444',borderRadius:'8px',color:'#ef4444',fontSize:'0.8rem'},children:["\u26A0\uFE0F ",connectionError]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AccountInfo,{balance:balance,lastDigit:lastDigit,currentPrice:currentPrice,connected:connected,accountType:accountType,platform:platform})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid-item chart-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CandlestickChart,{data:chartData,height:450})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid-item strategy-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(StrategySelector,{onSelectStrategy:setSelectedStrategy,selectedStrategy:selectedStrategy,platform:platform})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid-item controls-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TradingControls,{isTrading:isTrading,setIsTrading:setIsTrading,selectedStrategy:selectedStrategy,lastDigit:lastDigit,currentPrice:currentPrice,derivService:derivService.current,connected:connected,onResetStats:resetStats,accountType:accountType,balance:balance})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid-item trades-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(RecentTrades,{trades:trades})})]})]});};export default Dashboard;
